title: DJI’s Mic Mini records clear audio on the go, and it’s on sale for $60
summary: DJI's Mic Mini is a lightweight wireless microphone for content creators, now at its all-time low of $60. Weighing just 10 grams with dual transmitters, 400-meter range, noise cancellation, and 10+ hour battery life, it offers reliable audio capture for on-the-go video production.
content:
The DJI Mic Mini is matching its all-time low. | Image: DJI	

If you regularly create content for TikTok, Instagram, or YouTube on the go, bad sound quality can easily take away from an otherwise great video. DJI’s Mic Mini helps you record clear, reliable sound for videos without carrying around bulky, expensive gear, and it’s currently down to its all-time low price. You can buy the mic with two transmitters for $59.99 ($20 off) at Amazon.
DJI Mic Mini (with one mic and two transmitters)

Where to Buy:

 $79 $59.99 at Amazon

Built for on-the-go creators, the Mic Mini makes it easy to capture clearer audio than your phone or camera alone. It weighs just 10 grams, so it’s comfortable enough to wear all day, whether you clip it to your clothing or use a magnetic mount or lanyard. DJI also includes two transmitters, allowing you to record from farther away, with a range of up to about 400 meters. 
To give you more control over your sound, the receiver offers five adjustable volume levels, along with two noise cancellation modes. A basic setting works well for quieter indoor recordings, while the other is best suited for louder, crowded environments. It can also automatically lower the volume if things get too loud, so your sound stays clean and natural.
It also supports USB-C and Bluetooth, and can work with older Apple devices using a Lightning adapter, though that’s sold separately. The transmitter can last up to 11.5 hours, while the receiver runs for up to 10.5 hours on a single charge, which is more than enough for longer shoots, interviews, or livestreams.

zh.title: DJI Mic Mini 随时随地录制清晰音频，现价仅 $60 出售
zh.summary: DJI Mic Mini 是一款为内容创作者设计的轻量级无线麦克风，现已降至历史最低价 $60。仅重 10 克，配备双发射器、400 米通信范围、降噪功能和 10+ 小时续航，为移动视频制作提供可靠的音频捕捉。

title: Netflix launches a standalone app for kids’ games
summary: Netflix has launched Netflix Playground, a standalone app for games aimed at children eight and under, included with Netflix subscriptions at no cost with no ads or in-app purchases. The app is available now in the US, UK, Canada, Australia, Philippines, and New Zealand.
content: Netflix says the app gives children access to an "ever-growing" library of games for kids.

zh.title: Netflix 推出儿童游戏独立应用

title: Why safety regulators closed their investigation into Tesla’s remote parking feature
summary: NHTSA closed its investigation into Tesla's 'Actually Smart Summon' feature, finding that only a small fraction of cases resulted in incidents with no injuries reported. Tesla has issued multiple software updates to address safety concerns.
content: NHTSA closed its investigation into Tesla's "Actually Smart Summon" feature, saying that only a fraction of cases resulted in an incident, and that no incidents resulted in injury. Tesla has also issued a number of software updates.

zh.title: 安全监管机构为何关闭对特斯拉远程停靠功能的调查
zh.summary: 美国国家公路交通安全管理局关闭了对特斯拉"实际智能召唤"功能的调查，发现仅极少数案例导致事故，且未报告人员伤亡。特斯拉已发布多项软件更新以解决安全问题。

title: Robotaxi companies won’t say how often remote operators intervene
summary: Robotaxi companies including Waymo, Tesla, and Aurora are refusing to disclose how often remote operators must intervene to assist their autonomous vehicles. Senator Ed Markey is investigating the practice and has requested transparency from seven robotaxi companies about their reliance on remote assistance.
content:
Autonomous vehicle companies are refusing to disclose key details about their use of remote assistance teams, including how often these workers are forced to intervene to help their self-driving cars. 
Senator Ed Markey (D-MA) had asked robotaxi companies to disclose the information as part of an investigation by his office into the use of remote assistance operators (RAO). The senator's office sent letters to seven robotaxi companies - Aurora, May Mobility, Motional, Nuro, Tesla, Waymo, and Amazon's Zoox - seeking information about the use of remote workers to monitor the driverless vehicles and occasionally intervene when the vehicles nee …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 机器人出租车公司拒不透露远程操作员的干预频率
zh.summary: 包括Waymo、特斯拉和Aurora在内的机器人出租车公司拒绝披露远程操作员必须多频繁地进行干预以协助其自动驾驶车辆。参议员埃德·马基正在调查这一做法，并要求七家机器人出租车公司透露其对远程协助的依赖程度。

title: Iran threatens ‘Stargate’ AI data centers
summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps threatened to target U.S.-linked data centers, including AI facilities, if the U.S. follows through on threats to attack Iranian infrastructure. The escalating tensions raise concerns about critical technology infrastructure becoming military targets.
content: Iran said it will target U.S.-linked data centers with new missile strikes, as the war between the U.S. and Iran escalates.

zh.title: 伊朗威胁'星门'人工智能数据中心

title: Apple plans Supreme Court appeal in Epic Games App Store battle — again
summary: Apple plans to seek Supreme Court review of a ruling that restricts its ability to charge fees on external app payments, continuing its legal battle with Epic Games. The case centers on Apple's control over payments and its power to enforce App Store policies.
content: Apple plans to ask the Supreme Court to review its App Store fight with Epic Games, as it challenges a ruling limiting its ability to charge fees on external payments.

zh.title: 苹果计划再次对Epic Games应用商店诉讼案向最高法院上诉
zh.summary: 苹果计划寻求最高法院审查一项限制其对外部应用程序支付收费能力的裁决，继续与Epic Games的法律纠纷。该案件的焦点是苹果对支付的控制权及其执行应用商店政策的权力。

title: NASA’s Artemis II mission to fly around the far side of the Moon
summary: Artemis II launched on April 2, 2026, with four astronauts aboard for a 10-day lunar flyby to test hardware for future crewed moon landings. The mission marks NASA's return to lunar exploration after more than 50 years and aims to establish sustainable human presence on the Moon.
content:
In this handout image provided by NASA, Orion snapped this high-resolution selfie in space with a camera mounted on one of its solar array wings during a routine external inspection of the spacecraft on the second day into the Artemis II mission on April 3, 2026. | NASA via Getty Images	

Humans haven’t stepped foot on the Moon since NASA’s Apollo 17 mission in 1972. Now, the space agency is racing to get back to the lunar surface under the umbrella of its Artemis program — a nod to the Greek goddess and twin sister of Apollo, whose name was given to NASA’s first program to send humans to the Moon. 
The program has been plagued by years of delays, development mishaps, and billions of dollars in budget overruns, but the mission is unquestionably ambitious. The goal of Artemis is to create a sustainable presence near the Moon, instead of just sending humans to plant flags and make footprints. The agency also aims to send the first woman to the Moon through the Artemis program.
Artemis I successfully completed its uncrewed mission in 2022. On April 2nd, 2026, Artemis II launched from Kennedy Space Station carrying four astronauts in its Orion capsule. The plan is to travel around the Moon before returning to Earth in 10 days’ time. They’ll test out the hardware and systems that could soon see humans standing on the Moon for the first time in more than 50 years in the Artemis IV mission scheduled for 2028.
On Monday, April 6th, NASA’s livestream is broadcasting on YouTube and on Netflix as the Artemis II astronauts break the record for the furthest distance humans have traveled away from Earth, and during a planned drop in communications as Orion passes behind the Moon. 



					
The Artemis II astronauts will set a new distance record from Earth today
			
Today’s Artemis II lunar flyby will be livestreamed on Netflix.
			
The far side of the Moon peeks out to say hi.
			
You can’t doomscroll 230,000 miles from Earth.
			
Artemis II is more than halfway to the Moon.

zh.title: NASA的阿尔忒弥斯II号任务飞过月球远侧
zh.summary: 阿尔忒弥斯II号于2026年4月2日发射，搭载四名宇航员进行为期10天的月球绕飞任务，以测试未来载人登月的硬件。该任务标志着NASA在超过50年后重返月球探索，旨在建立人类在月球上的可持续存在。

title: Watch this video of how a job interviewer exposes a North Korean fake IT worker
summary: A person posing as a remote IT worker from North Korea was caught during a job interview when visibly stumped by a question asking them to insult the country's leader. The incident highlights ongoing North Korean efforts to infiltrate remote job positions.
content: An apparent North Korean worker was caught visibly stumped during a remote job interview when asked to insult the country's leader.

title: Netflix is launching a new app for kids games
summary: Netflix Playground, a dedicated app for children under eight featuring games based on popular shows like Peppa Pig, is now available in major markets with no ads or in-app purchases. The app rolls out globally on April 28th as Netflix expands its family gaming strategy.
content:
Netflix has made family-friendly titles a key part of its current games strategy, and now it's pushing a little harder with the launch of a new app. Called Netflix Playground, the app is focused on games aimed at kids aged eight and under, and, like the rest of Netflix's gaming lineup, Playground games are included as part of a Netflix subscription, and feature no ads or in-app purchases.
Playground is available now in the US, UK, Canada, Australia, the Philippines, and New Zealand, and will be rolling out to the rest of the world on April 28th. The launch lineup primarily consists of titles based on popular kids shows like Peppa Pig and Se …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Netflix推出儿童游戏新应用
zh.summary: Netflix Playground是一款面向8岁以下儿童的专用应用，展示基于热门节目（如小猪佩奇）的游戏，目前在主要市场推出，无广告也无应用内购买。该应用将于4月28日在全球推出，因为Netflix扩展其家庭游戏战略。

title: North Korea’s hijack of one of the web’s most used open source projects was likely weeks in the making
summary: North Korean hackers compromised a popular open source project through a weeks-long campaign targeting a top developer's computer, injecting malicious code into widely-used software. The attack demonstrates sophisticated supply chain tactics exploiting developer trust.
content: North Korean hackers pushed out malicious updates to a popular open source project by hacking a top developer's computer in a long-running campaign.

zh.title: 北朝鲜劫持网络上使用最广泛的开源项目的行为可能历时数周
zh.summary: 北朝鲜黑客通过针对顶级开发者计算机长达数周的活动，入侵了一个受欢迎的开源项目，在广泛使用的软件中注入恶意代码。该攻击表明了利用开发者信任的复杂供应链战术。

title: Samsung’s Galaxy S27 ‘Pro’ could squeeze in between the Ultra and Plus phones
summary: Samsung's upcoming S27 lineup will reportedly include a Galaxy S27 Pro positioned between Ultra and Plus models, featuring the Privacy Display technology from the S26 Ultra. The Pro model will lack S Pen support but offer premium display capabilities when launching next year.
content:
The S27 Pro will reportedly have the Privacy Display first seen on the S26 Ultra. | Photo: Allison Johnson / The Verge	

Samsung's S27 lineup, expected next year, might include a new member, the Galaxy S27 Pro, which would be a second premium option between Samsung's Ultra and Plus models, as first reported by ETNews. 
The new Pro model reportedly won't support the S Pen but will feature Samsung's Privacy Display, which is currently only available on the Galaxy S26 Ultra. The Privacy Display allows users to limit the viewing angle on their phone so that the content on the screen is only visible when they're looking directly at it. According to ET News' sources, Samsung is aiming to launch two phones with this premium display tech in its next-gen lineup, which …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 三星Galaxy S27"Pro"可能会在Ultra和Plus手机之间进行定位

title: OpenAI’s vision for the AI economy: public wealth funds, robot taxes, and a four-day work week
summary: OpenAI proposes taxes on AI profits, public wealth funds, expanded safety nets, and a four-day work week to address job displacement and inequality caused by AI advancement. The proposal blends wealth redistribution with market capitalism as policymakers debate AI's economic impact.
content: OpenAI proposes taxes on AI profits, public wealth funds, and expanded safety nets to address job loss and inequality, blending redistribution with capitalism as policymakers debate AI’s economic impact.

zh.title: OpenAI对AI经济的愿景：公共财富基金、机器人税和四天工作周

title: Iran threatens OpenAI’s Stargate data center in Abu Dhabi
summary: Iran's Revolutionary Guard Corps released a video threatening to destroy OpenAI's $30 billion Stargate data center in Abu Dhabi if the U.S. attacks Iranian infrastructure. The threat escalates military tensions and highlights vulnerabilities of critical AI infrastructure.
content:
An October 2025 image of OpenAI’s UAE Stargate data center under construction. | Image: G42	

Iran's Islamic Revolutionary Guard Corps (IRGC) has published a video threatening OpenAI's planned Abu Dhabi data center if the US follows through on threats to attack the country's power plants, as reported earlier by Tom's Hardware. The video, which was published to an Iranian state-backed news outlet's X account on April 3rd, says the IRGC will carry out the "complete and utter annihilation" of US-linked energy and technology companies in the region, before showing an image of OpenAI's $30 billion in-progress Stargate facility in the United Arab Emirates.
OpenAI's overarching $500 billion Stargate project includes investments from Oracle …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 伊朗威胁OpenAI在阿布扎比的Stargate数据中心
zh.summary: 伊朗伊斯兰革命卫队发布视频，威胁如果美国攻击伊朗基础设施，将摧毁OpenAI价值300亿美元的Stargate数据中心。该威胁升级了军事紧张局势，并突显了关键AI基础设施的脆弱性。

title: The Artemis II astronauts will set a new distance record from Earth today
summary: The Artemis II crew is expected to break Apollo 13's 56-year-old distance record today, traveling 252,757 miles from Earth during its lunar flyby. NASA's coverage begins at 1 PM ET with the record expected to be set at 1:56 PM ET.
content:
Artemis II Commander Reid Wiseman looks back at Earth from one of the Orion spacecraft’s main cabin windows. | Image: NASA	

On April 15th, 1970, Jim Lovell, Fred Haise, and Jack Swigert set a distance record when Apollo 13 traveled 248,655 miles from Earth. Nearly 56 years later, the crew of Artemis II is expected to break that record by several thousand miles when the Orion spacecraft reaches a maximum distance of 252,757 miles away from Earth later today as it completes its flight around the far side of the Moon.
NASA's coverage of the lunar flyby begins at 1PM ET today if you want to follow along at home, while the astronauts are expected to set the new distance record from Earth at 1:56PM ET. The trip around the far side of the Moon will take about six hours …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Artemis II宇航员将于今日创造地球距离新纪录
zh.summary: Artemis II乘组预计将在今日打破Apollo 13创造的56年前的距离纪录，在月球飞越期间距地球252,757英里。NASA直播将于美国东部时间下午1点开始，纪录预计在下午1:56创造。

title: Logitech’s haptics-enhanced MX Master 4 mouse is on sale for under $100
summary: Logitech's MX Master 4 wireless mouse is on sale for under $100, featuring new haptic feedback through its customizable Action Ring system. The mouse combines quiet operation, long battery life, and enhanced productivity features that work seamlessly on Windows and macOS.
content:
If you’re shopping for a wireless mouse that’ll help you multitask more easily, Logitech’s MX Master 4 is easily one of the best and most comfortable options available. It’s rarely discounted, but the black version is currently down to $99.99 ($20 off) at Newegg with code TRWF233. While it offers similarly quiet clicks and long battery life to the MX Master 3S, its direct predecessor, the newer model touts haptic feedback that offers tiny, satisfying jolts when you press its thumb rest to bring up Logitech’s Action Ring overlay.
Logitech MX Master 4 wireless mouse

Where to Buy:

 $119.99 $99.99 at Newegg (with code TRWF233)

The MX Master 4 works just as well on Windows as on macOS, and it includes a USB-C Bolt transmitter (previous models in the lineup included a USB-A version of the Bolt). I think this mouse is worth buying based on the hardware alone, though the additional features bundled with Logi Options, its companion app for desktop, add even more value. Clicking the thumb rest launches Action Rings, some of which are tailor-made for certain apps, such as Photoshop. Alternatively, you can customize your own Action Rings in the software, letting you quickly execute commands without mousing all over your screen(s).
Read our MX Master 4 hands-on impressions.
Other Verge-approved deals
The latest 13-inch MacBook Air with an M5 chip, 16GB of RAM, and a 512GB SSD is on sale for $949.99 at Amazon and Best Buy, which is $150 off its original launch price. While less than a month ago we bemoaned the $100 gen-to-gen price increase compared to the M4 version, we’re certainly not mad to see such a big discount already. At this price, absolutely no one should buy the M4 Air, as it’s the same price yet has half the storage (which is slower than in the latest-gen model) and lacks the speed and efficiency benefits of the M5 model. Read our review.
Anker’s new 3-in-1 Qi2.2 MagGo is cheaper than ever for Prime members on Amazon. The wireless charging dock recently launched f

zh.summary: 罗技MX Master 4无线鼠标售价不到100美元，通过可定制的Action Ring系统提供新的触觉反馈功能。该鼠标兼具安静操作、超长电池续航和增强型生产力功能，可在Windows和macOS上无缝运行。

title: Can AI responses be influenced? The SEO industry is trying
summary: The SEO industry is developing strategies to influence AI-generated search results, with companies potentially manipulating sources that AI models cite in responses. This raises concerns about the integrity and reliability of AI-powered search as companies attempt to gain prominence in AI-generated answers similar to Google's AI Mode.
content:
Let's pretend you work in IT and you're looking for a new digital service desk platform to help your employees reset passwords or onboard new hires. You use Google's AI Mode to search for suggestions, which quickly spits out a detailed answer listing companies to explore, their pricing, and what each option is best for. It helpfully cites more than a dozen websites, which AI Mode used to craft a response. The first source link is from Zendesk, a company that offers the exact service you're looking for - but when you click through, something is entirely off. 
A blog post attributed to the director of product marketing says Zendesk put togeth …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: AI 回应能被影响吗？SEO 行业在尝试
zh.summary: SEO 行业正在制定策略来影响 AI 生成的搜索结果,企业可能会操纵 AI 模型在响应中引用的来源。这引发了对 AI 驱动搜索完整性和可靠性的担忧,因为企业试图在类似谷歌 AI 模式的 AI 生成答案中获得突出地位。

title: The Xiaomi 17 Ultra has some impressive add-ons that make snapping photos really fun
summary: The Xiaomi 17 Ultra offers extensive photography customization through preset filters and hardware add-ons, giving users multiple creative options for image capture and editing. The device emphasizes photographic flexibility and hands-on control for mobile photography enthusiasts.
content: The Xiaomi 17 Ultra gives you a ton of options to play around with images, including preset filters and hardware add-ons.

zh.title: 小米 17 Ultra 拥有一些令人印象深刻的配件,使拍照变得非常有趣
zh.summary: 小米 17 Ultra 通过预设滤镜和硬件配件提供广泛的摄影定制,为用户提供多种创意的图像捕获和编辑选项。该设备强调摄影灵活性和移动摄影爱好者的动手控制。
